text.title: Tool Description Rewrite Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to audit a tool catalog, identify rewrite candidates, and validate the new descriptions cut tool-selection errors.

step.name: ingest-catalog
step.input: Tool catalog (JSON / Python dict / MCP server list)
step.action: Enumerate every tool with `name`, `description`, `input_schema`. Compute token-count per description.

step.name: score-each-tool
step.input: Catalog table + 5-axis rubric (use-when, not-use-when, input, output, side-effects)
step.action: For each tool, score 0/1 per axis. Verdict = `ok` (5/5), `rewrite` (≤3/5), `split` (one tool tries to cover >1 task).
step.output: Audit JSON matching the schema in 02-output-contract.xml

step.name: detect-overlap-pairs
step.action: Cluster by lexical similarity + verb-class. Any pair with cosine > 0.8 on description is flagged as overlap; both need mutual anti-triggers.
step.output: List of overlap pairs needing anti-trigger lines
step.decision-gate: If overlap rate > 20% of catalog, the catalog has a naming problem — escalate to verb-object-tool-naming methodology first.

step.name: rewrite-and-fit-budget
step.input: Audit JSON + overlap list + original signatures
step.action: Rewrite each `rewrite`-verdict tool using the 5-part structure. Cap each at 200 tokens. For each overlap pair add the partner's name in "do NOT use this when".
step.output: New description set ready to deploy

step.name: measure-pre-post
step.input: Eval set of 50 representative tasks + agent trace store
step.action: Run the eval with the OLD catalog, then deploy NEW descriptions, re-run. Count tool-selection errors and argument-fill errors per run.
step.output: Delta table — both error rates should drop measurably (per Anthropic SWE-bench reports).
step.decision-gate: If neither rate drops, the rewrite missed the actual confusion signal — capture failed traces and iterate.
